title: tritonia lineata
intro: Tritonia lineata, also known as the 'Painted Lady', is a plant species within the Iridaceae family, characterized by its vibrant, multicolored flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its iridoid glycosides and other compounds. Consuming the plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Tritonia lineata is often used in teas, infusions, or dried as a powder to be added to various remedies.
